creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 160754
Revision of shar file

Hi Chris,
I've attached an updated .shar.

Changes:
- Use http://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/ as the first MASTER_SITE.
  Let's take advantage of upstream geographically distributed CDN.  I've already validated the SHA checksums match for both the contents of your distfile and upstream so if you match up distfile to upstream we can uncomment that line.

- Regarding RESTRICTED/LICENSE, I can't find any proof that this is under a Creative Common's license.  I can't just slap the license into the port and claim it is so I commented those lines until we can work this out.  Can you help me with this?
